fix: switch to implicit OAuth flow to bypass PKCE verifier issue

The PKCE code verifier cookie was being lost during the Google OAuth
redirect chain. Implicit flow returns the token in the URL hash
fragment instead, eliminating the need for a code verifier entirely.

- Set flowType: "implicit" on browser Supabase client
- Callback page uses onAuthStateChange to detect session from hash

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

v2.0.0: #[conduit::command] with full #[tauri::command] parity, backward-compatible refactoring

Major release adding the #[conduit::command] attribute macro with full feature parity
to #[tauri::command]: named parameters, State<T>/AppHandle/Window/Webview injection,
Result<T, E> returns, and truly async handlers (tokio-spawned). Includes backward-
compatible API refactoring (handler_raw() for v1 migration), new Queue/ChannelBuffer
types for reliable streaming, comprehensive documentation updates, and fresh benchmarks.

Breaking changes:
- .handler() accepts impl ConduitHandler (use handler_raw() for old closures)
- RingBuffer::push() returns usize (use push_checked() for PushOutcome)
- Parameter names stay snake_case in JSON (no camelCase conversion)
- Error::Serialize wraps sonic_rs::Error directly

See CHANGELOG.md for the complete list.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: separate Telegram remote session from CLI node session

`node:{node_id}:{cwd_hash}`, so it never shares conversation
with CLI remote node sessions on the same machine.

commit.message:
fix(daemon): suppress shell startup OSC title changes with 2s grace period

Shells (zsh, oh-my-zsh) emit OSC 0 "zsh" during startup, overwriting
the user-facing "immorterm-#" display name. Add a 2-second grace period
after daemon spawn where OSC title changes are tracked but not broadcast
to WebSocket clients or persisted to the registry.

fix: convert raw HTML from LLM to Telegram-safe format

LLM sometimes outputs raw HTML tags (<b>, <pre>, <table>, <h1>, etc.)
instead of markdown. Added pre-processing that converts HTML to markdown
first, then lets the existing markdown→HTML pipeline handle it uniformly.
HTML tables become monospace <pre> tables.

commit.message:
fix(tiering): fix flaky op_manager_test by waiting for cancelled stash IOs (#6852)

WaitForPendingStashes only checked pending_stash_cnt, which tracks
version-matching stash completions. Cancelled stash IOs (superseded
by newer stashes for the same id) could still be in flight, leaving
allocated_bytes inflated when the assertion ran. Also wait for
pending_ops to drain so all IO callbacks (including cancellation
frees) complete before checking allocated_bytes.

Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
